mapper.select: SELECT USER_NO AS userNo, TOTAL_AMOUNT AS totalAmount FROM TBL_CURRENCY WHERE USER_NO = #{value}
SELECT USER_NO AS userNo, LOG_DATE AS logDate, LOG_REASON AS logReason, CHANGE_AMOUNT AS changeAmount FROM TBL_LOG_POINT WHERE USER_NO = #{value} ORDER BY LOG_DATE DESC, LOG_NO DESC
mapper.update: MERGE INTO TBL_CURRENCY tc USING( SELECT #{userNo} AS User_No, 1 as currency_id FROM DUAL) src on (tc.user_no = src.user_no and tc.currency_id = src.currency_id) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (currency_id, user_no, total_amount) VALUES (1, #{userNo}, #{changeAmount}) WHEN MATCHED THEN Update set total_amount = TOTAL_AMOUNT + #{changeAmount}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_LOG_POINT ( LOG_NO, USER_NO, CURRENCY_ID, CHANGE_AMOUNT, LOG_REASON, LOG_DATE ) VALUES ( SEQ_TBL_LOG_POINT.NEXTVAL, #{userNo}, 1, #{changeAmount}, #{logReason}, SYSDATE )
